# HSD 14027254831: [DMRA0][X4][DRAM RAPL] PWR_LIM is not working after seting it to 0W

## Root Cause Summary

DRAM RAPL algorithm is broken after set PWR_LIM to 0W, it is not applying any power limitation unlike when we ser the PWR_LIM to 1W.

#Setting PWR_LIM to TDP

In [21]: sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.dram_rapl_pl1_control.pwr_lim = 0xa60

In [27]: energy = []

In [28]: for i in range(10):

    ...:     energy.append(poll_dram_energy(0, 0))

    ...:     sleep(0.0025)

    ...:

In [29]: sum(energy)/len(energy)

Out[29]: 
150.19493504058116

In [33]: #Setting pwr lim to 1W

In [34]: sv.so

### Forum Notes
[26ww10.3]

This sighting can be merged with 
16029895595 - [DMR A0 VV][X4][RAPL] The mitigation algo is not triggered by primecode when power is limited
 as the JIRA fix is for al RAPL related sightings.

### Description
DRAM RAPL algorithm is broken after set PWR_LIM to 0W, it is not applying any power limitation unlike when we ser the PWR_LIM to 1W.

#Setting PWR_LIM to TDP

In [21]: sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.dram_rapl_pl1_control.pwr_lim = 0xa60

In [27]: energy = []

In [28]: for i in range(10):

    ...:     energy.append(poll_dram_energy(0, 0))

    ...:     sleep(0.0025)

    ...:

In [29]: sum(energy)/len(energy)

Out[29]: 
150.19493504058116

In [33]: #Setting pwr lim to 1W

In [34]: sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.dram_rapl_pl1_control.pwr_lim = 8

In [35]: energy = []

In [36]: for i in range(10):

    ...:     energy.append(poll_dram_energy(0, 0))

    ...:     sleep(0.0025)

    ...:

In [37]: sum(energy)/len(energy)

Out[37]: 
46.00633980337324

In [38]: #Setting PWR_LIM to 0W

In [39]: sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.dram_rapl_pl1_control.pwr_lim = 0

In [40]: energy = []

In [41]: for i in range(10):

    ...:     energy.append(poll_dram_energy(0, 0))

    ...:     sleep(0.0025)

    ...:

#Power consumed is not limited by the PWR_LIM

In [42]: sum(energy)/len(energy)

Out[42]: 
146.58419065856407

#Setting PWR_LIM to 1W, expectation is to recover the limitation and it is not

In [43]: sv.socket0.imh0.punit.ptpcfsms.ptpcfsms.dram_rapl_pl1_control.pwr_lim = 8

In [44]: energy = []

In [45]: for i in range(10):

    ...:     energy.append(poll_dram_energy(0, 0))

    ...:     sleep(0.0025)

    ...:

In [46]: sum(energy)/len(energy)

Out[46]: 
150.1723002172777
